name: Seed1.5-Thinking
note: RL-trained reasoning MoE matching o3-mini-high on AIME24; served via Volcano Engine API only.

results.notes: ARC-AGI score of 39.9% from the official Seed-Thinking-v1.5 README comparison table (Seed1.5-Thinking 39.9% vs DeepSeek R1 18.3%, OpenAI o3-mini 25.8%, Grok 3 Beta 31.9%, Gemini 2.5 Pro 27.6%). The table labels it simply 'ARC-AGI' without specifying v1 or v2, and the arXiv paper (2504.13914) body text does not mention ARC-AGI at all. Mapped to arc-agi-1 rather than arc-agi-2 because the score magnitude is only consistent with ARC-AGI-1: as of April 2025 all four comparison models (DeepSeek R1, o3-mini, Grok 3, Gemini 2.5 Pro) scored under ~10% on ARC-AGI-2's semi-private eval, whereas 18-32% scores for this same group are squarely in the known ARC-AGI-1 range for that period. Flagging this inference for reviewer scrutiny given the corpus's known variant-conflation risk.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: arXiv 2504.13914 (initial submission April 10, 2025, matching releaseDate), GitHub repo ByteDance-Seed/Seed-Thinking-v1.5, and official ByteDance Seed blog all corroborate. Params 200B total/20B active MoE confirmed in the paper abstract. AIME24 86.7, GPQA 77.3, Codeforces (pass@8) 55.0, and LiveCodeBench v5 64.9 all confirmed reading the paper/GitHub page directly. VentureBeat coverage independently confirms the 'matching o3-mini-high on AIME24' comparison. CORRECTION: dropped the unverified claim that this model is 'aka doubao-1.5-thinking-pro' — fetched ByteDance's own Seed1.5-Thinking blog post directly and it does not state this equivalence (only that Doubao 1.5 Pro's training data was reused); softened the note field accordingly. Also downgraded 'GPQA Diamond' notes label to plain 'GPQA' since the source only says 'GPQA' without specifying the Diamond variant. Pricing figures ($0.556/$2.222) could not be independently pinned to a specific fetched Volcano Engine pricing page for this exact model ID and are carried over with lower confidence; ctxK of 128K likewise not directly confirmed for this text model (source used is a general Volcano Engine docs page, not model-specific).
